allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/chamados/atendimento-pendente" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60 | Select-Object StatusCode, @{N='Corpo';E={$_.Content | ConvertFrom-Json | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 1}})

PowerShell(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/chamados/atendimento-pendente" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60 | ForEach-Object { $data = $_.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "disponivel:" $data.disponivel; Write-Host "total pendentes:" $data.chamados.Count; $data.chamados | Select-Object -First 3 | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 2 })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/chamados/atendimento-pendente" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60 | ForEach-Object { $_.Content | ConvertFrom-Json }; Write-Host "disponivel:" $r.disponivel; Write-Host "pendentes:" $r.chamados.Count; $r.chamados | Select-Object -First 3 | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 2)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/chamados/atendimento-pendente?dias=180&limite=300" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60 | ForEach-Object { $_.Content | ConvertFrom-Json }; Write-Host "disponivel:" $r.disponivel; Write-Host "pendentes com 180d:" $r.chamados.Count)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/chamados?dias=90&limite=5&status_grupo=aberto" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30 | ForEach-Object { $_.Content | ConvertFrom-Json }; $r | Select-Object chave, status, organizacao_atual | ConvertTo-Json)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/chamados?dias=90&limite=3&status_grupo=aberto" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30 | ForEach-Object { $_.Content | ConvertFrom-Json }; $r | Select-Object chave, atendimento | ConvertTo-Json)
